name: cc-tools
description: cc-tools — the tools layer of the cc-* harness: philosophy-agnostic helpers usable in any project. /crux unwinds a pain, doubt, or blockage into ONE diagnosis and angle of attack; /slap resets a fix stuck in a rabbit hole; /cc-init onboards a project onto the harness (dependencies, recommended rules, a reminder cheat-sheet, doc reconciliation); plus a set of recommended project rules installed into .claude/rules/. The product funnel lives in cc-funnel; the musician (cc-agent) drives it; cc-maestro supervises.
